seo_title: Cozy Cactus | Family-Friendly Vacation Rental in Indio with Pool
seo_description: The family vacation rental in Indio where parents actually rest. 3BR Coachella Valley home with pool, infant gear & labeled everything. Book direct, save 15%.
tagline: Where parents finally rest on vacation.
description_heading: First Time You've Truly Rested on Vacation?
description_p1: That's what guests say. "It's the first time we have truly rested during our vacation with our 3 children!" That review is real. And it's not the only one.
description_p2: Cozy Cactus is designed around a truth nobody in the vacation rental industry wants to say out loud: vacations with kids are usually more exhausting than staying home. So everything here is built to flip that. Pack-n-play already set up. Sound machines in every bedroom. High chairs. Stokke chairs. A labeled drawer system so you're not hunting for spatulas while kids melt down before dinner. That unprecedented organization system guests rave about in the reviews? It's not marketing copy. It's actually there.
description_p3: Three bedrooms, two bathrooms, sleeps up to eight. Playful energy meets thoughtful design — turquoise, coral, and warm color throughout. A kitchen that makes meal prep feel manageable. A private hot tub for after the kids are asleep. A community pool right across the street for the days when you want more space to run. Coffee bar stocked and ready at 6am when the toddler decides that's morning now.
description_p4: Bunk beds in the kids' room. A curated toy collection that took actual thought. The little details that make you text your co-parent: "We should just stay another night." This is the kind of place where kids ask when you're coming back, and you're already checking the calendar before you've loaded the car.
